issue.description: Completion menus in the ACE prompt input and the xprompt LSP offer agents, agent families, agent clans, and @tribes for %wait and #fork, with each entry's kind unmistakable at a glance.
issue.title: Group-aware agent completion for %wait and

issue.description: 'Kind-aware agent catalog and LSP completion' section: extend the editor helper agent catalog with family/clan/tribe entries and teach the Rust xprompt LSP to complete and render all four reference kinds for %wait arguments and agent-typed xprompt arguments.
issue.title: Kind-aware agent catalog and LSP completion

issue.description: 'Group-aware prompt-input completion menu' section: add family/clan/tribe candidates with distinct, aligned completion rows to the ACE prompt input for %wait arguments and agent-typed xprompt arguments.
issue.title: Group-aware prompt-input completion menu

fields.notes: Implemented schema-v1 kind-aware agent, family, clan, and tribe catalog entries from one artifact snapshot; added Rust kind-aware wait/fork candidates, active-clause exclusion, async %wait helper routing, and distinct LSP rendering. Verification: focused Python tests pass; sase_core and sase_xprompt_lsp full tests pass; Rust Clippy passes; Python fmt/ruff/mypy/symvision/toobig pass. Full Python suite: 19258 passed, 7 skipped, with 3 unrelated existing failures (two update-command console wrapping assertions and one 107-pixel clan-panel PNG drift). just check also reaches SASE validation but is blocked by unrelated generated-skill drift in the external chezmoi setup.

Implemented kind-aware ACE prompt completion for tribes, newest-generation clans, families, and agents; added canonical matching, ordering, de-duplication, selected-value exclusion, aligned group rows, help/docs updates, unit coverage, and wait/fork PNG snapshots. Verification: fmt/Ruff/mypy/pyscripts/Symvision/toobig passed; 19,268 full-suite tests passed plus both new visual snapshots. Repository-wide commands retain unrelated pre-existing init-skills drift and agents_clan_panel_epic golden mismatch.
